message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.getmaskarray wrapper parity (franken_numpy-9la1)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.ma.getmaskarray, which always
returns a concrete boolean ndarray of the same shape as the input —
the MaskedArray's mask when non-trivial, otherwise a full-False
array. Test covers partially-masked 1-D, fully-masked, nomask
MaskedArray, plain ndarray, Python list, 2-D MaskedArray, empty
MaskedArray, and dtype parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
